skills.name: capgo-public-api
skills.description: Use Capgo's public API docs and API-key authentication model to manage organizations, apps, channels, devices, bundles, statistics, and API keys.

skills.name: capgo-mobile-signing-tools
skills.description: Use Capgo's browser-based signing tools to generate iOS CSRs, create Android keystores, and capture iPhone or iPad UDIDs.

skills.name: capgo-cli-mcp
skills.description: Run the local Capgo CLI MCP server with bunx so agents can manage live updates, channels, bundles, stats, apps, and native builds.

skills.name: capgo-site-routing
skills.description: Route developers to the right Capgo landing pages for pricing, native builds, signing tools, API docs, AI skills, and enterprise workflows.
